mapper.sql:
( LAG(MAX(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NULL OR (
MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFMONTH(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value))) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFYEAR(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value))) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
) )

( LEAD(MIN(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NOT NULL AND
= AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
= AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFMONTH(LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFYEAR(LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
)
mapper.select: SELECT s.name as site_name, d.devicename as device_name, d.id as device_id, JSON_ARRAYAGG() as data_type FROM api_access aa JOIN api_access_site_map am ON am.id_api_access = aa.id JOIN api_access_endpoint_map em ON em.id_api_access = aa.id JOIN api_endpoint ae ON ae.id = em.id_end_point JOIN site s ON s.id = am.id_site JOIN device d ON d.id_site = s.id JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN device_parameters dp on dp.id_device_group = d.id_device_group LEFT JOIN generic_parameters gp ON gp.id = dp.id_generic_parameter WHERE aa.security_key = #{key} AND aa.status = 1 AND am.status = 1 AND em.status = 1 AND ae.route = #{route} AND ae.method = #{method} AND ae.is_active = 1 AND ae.is_delete = 0 AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND dp.status = 1 AND dp.is_delete = 0 AND dp.is_filter = 1 AND d.show_on_domain != 6 AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL) GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY s.id, d.id
